violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Dishes and cups were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
Observed missing ceiling tiles throughout basement area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
